prose:
Calculation details (method-provenance block)
• Property: condensed Fukui functions f⁺, f⁻, dual descriptor, and identification of the most electrophilic/nucleophilic atom for furan.
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier ‘standard’), no density fitting (exact four-center integrals).
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz; single-point N, N ± 1 calculations (no re-optimization), i.e. DFT//input-XYZ.
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent specified).
• Charge / multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (0, 1); cation state (+1, 2); anion state (–1, 2).
• Software: PySCF (via chemkit fukui-reactivity skill).
• Convergence: all three SCF calculations reported “converged: true” (see live log).
• Engine integrity verdict: trustworthy = true.
• Warnings: every warning from the tool is listed verbatim in the warnings field above.

Key numerical results
Atom ordering (0-based): 0 O, 1 C, 2 C, 3 C, 4 C, 5–8 H
Condensed Fukui functions (Mulliken charges):
  f⁺  = [-1.3316182, 1.2286866, 1.2270264, 1.9233053, 1.9242931, -1.2190639, -1.2191056, -0.76678308, -0.76674059]
  f⁻  = [ 0.08382155, 0.089103093, 0.089304821, 0.1615270, 0.1616371, 0.10248412, 0.10251350, 0.10481615, 0.10479266]
  f⁰  = [-0.62389834, 0.65889485, 0.65816562, 1.0424161, 1.0429651, -0.55828991, -0.55829603, -0.33098346, -0.33097396]
  Dual descriptor = [-1.4154398, 1.1395835, 1.1377216, 1.7617783, 1.7626560, -1.3215481, -1.3216190, -0.87159923, -0.87153325]

Most electrophilic site: atom 5 (C, index 4) with f⁺ = 1.9242931
Most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C, index 4) with f⁻ = 0.1616371

Reproducibility
• Command executed (see `cli_invocation` in JSON):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0emrqm1i/live.json
• Result JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0emrqm1i/live.json
• Live PySCF/chemkit log was written during the run to the standard `<subcommand>_<timestamp>.out` file in the working directory (path available on request).

The headline number reported above is the largest f⁺ value (1.9242931), identifying the most electrophilic carbon atom in gas-phase furan at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level.
